The latest earnings season has pushed the stock market (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) to new highs yet again, especially on the back of heightened AI demand and adoption.

headline: Republican lawmakers are trading like Trump, piling into Big Tech stocks
summary: Republican lawmakers are adjusting their investment portfolios to keep up with President Trump's latest trades, the US leader favoring Nvidia (NVDA), Intel (INTC), and other Big Tech names. Yahoo Finance Washington Correspondent Ben Werschkul reports on this trend, giving rise to renewed concerns around Congressional stock trading.
